name: Beef, Cauliflower, and Snow Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium cauliflower head, broken into florets
1 pound very thin sliced flank steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 2-inch strips and set aside.
2. Mix cornstarch and soy sauce and set aside.
3. Heat the chicken stock and set aside.
4. Heat oil in a heavy skillet or wok until very hot.
5. Add garlic to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add beef to the pan and sauté quickly, keeping it moving, just until it loses color, about 30 seconds.
7. Add onion, salt, and pepper; stir constantly for another half minute or so.
8. Add chicken broth; bring to a boil, then add cauliflower pieces, a few at a time.
9. Cook for 3 minutes, then add snow peas; stir constantly for another few minutes.
10. After 7 minutes maximum, the cauliflower should be tender and pea pods bright green.
11. Add the soy sauce mixture; mix thoroughly and stir until thickened.
12. Turn into a heavy serving dish and serve immediately.
